title: OLI Actor
description: An entity that participates in a custody transfer event within the OLI network.

actorType.description: Role of this actor in the logistics chain.

name.description: Full name of the individual or organisation.

bvn.description: Bank Verification Number (Nigeria). 11 digits. Used for identity linkage; never exposed publicly.

orgName.description: Name of the organisation this actor represents (e.g. a courier company or warehouse).
